column1: Friends of Salmon Bay - Proposed Budget 2025-2026

column3: Funds available to support needs as they arise through the year including Kiln repair, new committee initiatives, Seminars for students, and more!

Funding to fill the gap left by the district to support essential staff and faculty for the school year extending nurse and reading specialist availability, increasing days for administrative secretary to accommodate scheduling, kindergarten readiness days and more.
Supports yearly activities and supplies like graduations, , Lantern Festival, Yearbooks, and Supplies for exploratory studies,WEB, and SEP
Supplies for sets, costumes, performance fees
Salmon Bay t-shirts for incoming Kindergarteners
Teacher supplies for MS Exploratory Classes
Provided to all elementary and middle students
Scholarships for Fall Connections, K-8 camps, after school activities, SEP, School supplies, and enrichment fees
Covers FOSB administrative operations including liability insurance, bookkeeper fees, communications, QuickBooks license, state/city filings, and supplies.
Review past year and plan for next
Software for check printing and tracking

Supports school community engagement including grade level events (BCI), Pi Night, staff appreciation, traffic safety, sustainability initiatives, fundraising expenses, advocacy participation, and PIE Speakers (Parent Information Exchange)
Materials and signage for pedestrian/cyclist safety
New this year.  Money from Emerging committee Fund
